title: refactor: move community-monitor to apps/operation/
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Moves `scripts/community-monitor/` → `apps/operation/community-monitor/` (git mv, history preserved)
- Joins the other internal ops tooling (economics, finance, kpi, quest-dashboard)
- Updates path references in .gitignore, README deploy commands, and the systemd unit
- `scripts/` shrinks back to just `cf-account.sh`

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

gist.headline: Spring cleaning the ops folder
gist.blurb: We're tidying up the hive! The community monitor script has moved to its new home with the rest of our internal operations tools.
gist.summary: Moved the community-monitor tooling from scripts/ to apps/operation/ to consolidate internal operations apps.
gist.impact: Developers will find the community monitor alongside other ops tools like economics and kpi dashboards, keeping the root scripts folder clean.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot organizing files or boxes into a neat cabinet labeled 'Operations', representing the consolidation of internal tools.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee and the chunky Monitor Robot organizing small pixelated boxes into a neat filing cabinet. One box has a tiny heart icon representing the community monitor. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm cream gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
